LePIC+ 3D
  • Overview
  • View page source

Overview

LePIC is a modular electrostatic Particle-In-Cell (PIC) plasma simulation code written in modern Fortran.

The code is designed for plasma source simulations, RF discharges, ion extraction, and plasma-wall interaction studies.

Applications

  • RF ion sources

  • Plasma discharges

  • Plasma chemistry

  • Beam extraction studies

  • Numerical plasma physics research

Main Features

  • Electrostatic PIC solver

  • Modular OOP architecture

  • MPI/OpenMP support

  • Plasma chemistry and collisions

  • RF electron heating

  • Flexible boundary conditions

  • Structured diagnostic outputs

Code Organization

The project is organized into:

  • Src/ legacy implementation

  • modules/ modular implementation

  • InputData/ simulation input files

  • Output/ simulation outputs

  • Plot/ visualization scripts
